summary: Tested Phase 1 OSM map feature end-to-end. Backend: 14/17 new pytest cases pass. 2 real backend bugs confirmed (POST /incidents/{id}/resources drops new fields; PATCH /resources/{id} cannot null-clear lat/lng). Validation on ort_lat/ort_lng/ort_zoom and fms_status/lat/lng/divera_id works correctly. Regression suite still 156/163 (same 7 pre-existing baseline failures). Frontend: KartePage fully functional — sidebar nav-karte present, KartePage shows karte-title, all 5 KPIs (kpi-on-map, kpi-fms-verfuegbar, kpi-fms-einsatz, kpi-fms-sprechwunsch, kpi-fms-offline), map-sidebar with map-resources-unplaced (9 unplaced KTWs/RTWs etc.), map-fms-legend listing all 10 FMS statuses with German BOS labels. NewIncidentDialog shows MapPicker + map-picker-search. Click 'Platzieren' → place-mode-banner appears; clicking empty map area places resource (PATCH /api/resources/{id} with lat/lng), pin appears, KPI 'on-map' goes 0→1. Clicking placed pin opens map-edit-resource-dialog with map-resource-fms (shadcn Select), map-resource-divera input, and map-resource-unplace button. 'Ort bearbeiten' opens map-edit-location-dialog. LagePage with operational incident having ort_lat shows embedded incident-map and lage-open-karte button.

critical.issue: Route builds doc dict manually and OMITS new fields lat, lng, divera_id, fms_status — even though the Pydantic model ResourceCreate accepts them. Creating a resource with these fields succeeds (201) but the persisted document does not contain them. Verified via subsequent GET. File: /app/backend/routes/resources.py lines 35-46 (doc dict).

Uses payload.model_dump(exclude_none=True). Passing {lat: null, lng: null} results in upd={} → returns 400 'Keine Aenderungen'. Cannot unset lat/lng → 'Von Karte entfernen' (map-resource-unplace) flow will be broken at the backend layer. Frontend either needs different signaling (e.g., explicit unplace endpoint) or backend should treat explicit nulls as $unset. Same risk applies to incident PATCH for ort_lat/ort_lng.

minor.issue: Pre-existing 7 failures (hardcoded version asserts 0.2.0/0.4.0/0.5.0/0.6.0 vs current 1.0.0; S4 sichtung not in Literal). Same baseline as iter13 — unrelated to map feature.

ui_bugs.issue: When user clicks on the map while in place-mode, clicks that land on the incident center pin open the incident popup INSTEAD of placing the resource. Resource never gets lat/lng. User must click an empty area away from the marker. Recommend stopPropagation/onClick on marker should be disabled in place-mode, or place-mode should swallow marker clicks.

integration_issues.issue: Will fail end-to-end because PATCH /api/resources/{id} cannot clear lat/lng with null body (exclude_none drops it). Frontend likely needs a backend change. UI test was not able to verify successful unplace because of this backend bug.

action_items: Fix POST /api/incidents/{id}/resources to include lat/lng/divera_id/fms_status in inserted doc. Easiest: build doc from data.dict() pass-through instead of cherry-picking keys.

Fix PATCH /api/resources/{id} to support clearing lat/lng. Options: (a) use exclude_unset=True instead of exclude_none, OR (b) detect explicit nulls and translate to $unset, OR (c) add dedicated POST /api/resources/{id}/unplace endpoint. Apply same logic to incident PATCH if Ort needs clearing.

KartePage: in place-mode, prevent the incident center marker (and resource pins) from intercepting clicks so the map click handler fires reliably. e.g., set marker interactive=false while placeMode is active, OR catch marker click and forward to placement.
critical_code_review_comments: models.py: Incident.ort_lat/ort_lng/ort_zoom and Resource.lat/lng/divera_id/fms_status correctly typed with ge/le bounds and max_length. Validation rejects out-of-range values (422). Good.

routes/resources.py create_resource: hand-rolled doc dict is fragile — easy to forget new fields (which is exactly what happened). Recommend `doc = {**data, 'id': str(uuid4()), 'incident_id': incident_id, 'created_at': iso(now), 'updated_at': iso(now)}`.

routes/resources.py update_resource: exclude_none=True is too aggressive for optional fields that need to be explicitly nullable (lat/lng/divera_id/fms_status). Same comment applies to incidents PATCH for ort_lat/ort_lng/ort_zoom.

Frontend KartePage: clean separation of concerns — incident-map, sidebar, KPIs, FMS legend, place-mode banner all wired. All required data-testid attributes present and discoverable. FMS_STATUS mapping in /lib/fms-status.js correctly covers BOS 0-9 with German labels and proper color hex values.

Frontend MapPicker: data-testid=map-picker-coords and map-picker-clear are conditional on a pin existing (verified — only render when marker is set). That is correct behavior, but tests asserting their presence on empty dialog open will fail unless a pin is first placed via search/click.
leaflet-setup.js + tile URL: tile.openstreetmap.org loaded successfully (24 tiles); icon fix works (no 404s in console).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_map_geocoding.py (new — 17 cases for incidents/resources location + FMS validation + persistence + unplace flow)

success_rate.frontend: 85% (place flow works, all selectors present; unplace blocked by backend bug; minor place-mode UX issue)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_LOC_PERSIST incidents via test fixtures (Berlin 52.52,13.405). Cleaned up after testing via direct mongo delete on name regex ^TEST_. Placed 1 KTW 1 resource on KartePage at ~52.53,13.36 during UI test — left in DB for next agent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Active incident with ort_lat is required for /karte page (else placeholder). Use existing TEST_LOC_PERSIST or 'Berlin' incidents that have ort_lat set. localStorage keys: 'els-role' and 'els-active-incident' (id string, not object). MapPicker conditional testids: map-picker-coords and map-picker-clear only render after a pin is placed. To place a resource: click [data-testid=btn-place-{id}] then click on EMPTY area of map far from the incident center marker — clicking through the incident pin will not work. EditResourceDialog opens by clicking the .els-resource-pin DOM element (use force=True). Unplace flow currently broken at backend (see action items).
rca of the issue: Bug 1 (resource create drops fields): routes/resources.py create_resource constructs the insert doc by manually listing keys; new fields (lat/lng/divera_id/fms_status) were added to the Pydantic model but never added to the doc dict. Reproduction: POST /api/incidents/{id}/resources with body containing lat=53.55 → 201 OK but GET shows no lat. Fix: spread `data` into the doc. Bug 2 (PATCH cannot null fields): exclude_none=True strips explicit nulls. Reproduction: PATCH /api/resources/{id} body {lat: null} → 400 'Keine Aenderungen'. Fix: switch to exclude_unset=True; semantics: if client omits key, don't touch; if client sends null, $unset or $set null.
